subcodes.first_line: In all times doth the Water of Life stream forth and flow from the Pen of the All-Merciful, yet the heedless souls remain veiled therefrom [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: در کل احیان کوثر حیوان از قلم رحمن جاری و ساری ولکن نفوس غافله از آن محجوب و
subcodes.subjects: @heedlessness and ignorance of the people, @prayer for spiritual recognition, @Word of God and human limitations, @justice ['adl]; social justice and divine justice, @living waters; water of life
